markets.rules_primary: If Tie is the result of the first half of regulation time in the Campbell vs Monmouth men's college basketball game originally scheduled for Mar 9, 2026, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary: The following market refers to the team that scores the most points during the specified half. Only points scored during the specified half of play count towards this market. If both teams score the same amount of points during the half, all team strikes resolve to No and the Tie strike resolves to Yes. If this game is postponed or delayed, the market will remain open and close after the rescheduled game has finished (within two weeks).

markets.rules_secondary: This event will specifically encompass the number listed under the Albums column on the Hits Daily Double’s Top 50 chart for the relevant week. If data is unavailable or partially unavailable by the Expiration date, then all affected markets resolve to No. Clarification 01/26/2026: Hits Daily Double recently adjusted the release timing of its weekly Top 50 Album Chart, publishing the chart with a Thursday date instead of the previously-used Friday date. Given the changed schedule of release from Friday to Thursday, Kalshi will resolve future markets using the chart dated Thursday as the Contract Underlying, pursuant to Rule 7.2(a).
